message:
Add comprehensive login command tests for browser and device code flows

Adds unit tests for the jfp login command covering both authentication flows:

## Test Coverage (537 lines, ~45 tests)

### Local Browser OAuth Flow Tests

Environment detection:
- Detects SSH session via SSH_CLIENT and SSH_TTY env vars
- Detects missing DISPLAY on Linux (headless)
- Falls back to device code when browser not available
- Proceeds with browser flow when DISPLAY is available

Already logged in handling:
- Detects existing valid credentials
- Prompts user or returns error in JSON mode
- Respects --force flag to re-authenticate

Local server callback:
- Starts local server on random available port
- Handles successful OAuth callback with token exchange
- Handles callback errors (denied, expired, etc.)
- Cleans up server after authentication completes
- Timeout handling for unresponsive auth

Credential storage:
- Saves credentials with correct structure
- Creates config directory if not exists
- Sets correct file permissions

### Device Code Flow Tests (--remote flag)

Device code request:
- Requests device code from /api/cli/device-code endpoint
- Displays user code prominently
- Shows verification URL
- Handles API errors gracefully

Polling behavior:
- Polls /api/cli/device-token at correct interval
- Handles "authorization_pending" status (keep polling)
- Handles "slow_down" status (increase interval)
- Handles "expired_token" status (prompt retry)
- Handles successful authorization

JSON output mode:
- Outputs structured JSON for all success/error cases
- Includes device code and verification URL
- Matches expected schema for scripting

### Error Handling Tests

Network errors:
- Handles connection refused
- Handles DNS resolution failure
- Handles timeout

API errors:
- Handles 401 Unauthorized
- Handles 429 Rate Limited
- Handles 500 Server Error

### Test Infrastructure

- Uses temp directories for credential isolation
- Mocks fetch for network requests
- Mocks console.log for output capture
- Cleans up after each test
- Restores all mocks in afterEach

Files added:
- packages/cli/__tests__/commands/login.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
